comment: Full-day exchange closure calendars fetched weekly by the clock
(see marketHolidays.cpp - MARKET_HOLIDAYS_URL points at the raw GitHub
URL of this file). Update this file when an exchange publishes next
year's schedule and every device picks it up within a week - no
Format: holidays.<EXCHANGE> = array of YYYYMMDD integers, weekday
closures only (weekends are handled by the market-status logic).
An exchange listed here fully replaces its compiled-in table; an
exchange omitted here keeps the compiled-in fallback. Max 8 exchanges,
88 dates each. Half-day early closes are not modeled.
SSE State Council holiday schedule | TSE https://www.jpx.co.jp |
